title: Falafel
steps: Soak chickpeas overnight in plenty of water.
Add chickpeas, onion, garlic, parsley, cilantro, and dill into a food processor.
Pulse until coarse grain texture (NOT paste).
Shape into small balls or patties.
Heat oil to 170–180°C and deep fry until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
servingSuggestions: Serve in warm pita bread with lettuce, tomato, and cucumber.
Add tahini sauce and pickled vegetables.
Serve as part of a mezze platter.
chefTips: Never use canned chickpeas — texture will be wrong.
Keep mixture cold before frying for better binding.
Do not over-blend; texture should remain grainy.
Maintain steady oil temperature for crispy exterior.
